## Design Document

Link to or paste your DESIGN.md here.

## Implementation Notes

Anything you'd like us to know about your implementation choices?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have written and attached a DESIGN.md
- [ ] I have implemented the required service functions in src/services.py
- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Server starts and responds to requests (`uvicorn src.app:app --reload`)
- [ ] I have considered edge cases (overlapping leave, insufficient balance, self-approval)
